item.title: MAD213 Basic Statistics, Week 03
item.description: ## Warning: package 'kableExtra' was built under R version 4.0.3 Date Topic October 7 Introduction October 23 Measures of location and dispersion (Lecture slides link) ☀️ GERTUNC 📊
